title: Operate JJ daily cadence from canonical task-state
closeout_note: Validated JJ daily cadence under canonical task-state using the player parlay execution cycle end-to-end. TASKS.md and STATUS.md were not used as control surfaces.
summary: Run the factory cadence from canonical task-state and wrapper-based cadence tools, not markdown-first drift.
acceptance_criteria: JJ uses canonical task-state as the control surface
TASKS.md and STATUS.md are treated as visibility only
JJ Digest is used as a computed cadence surface
No old markdown-first task/status assumptions are used in operation
One real cadence cycle is reviewed under the new model

history.closeout_note: Validated JJ daily cadence under canonical task-state using the player parlay execution cycle end-to-end. TASKS.md and STATUS.md were not used as control surfaces.
